summary: Clean TDD cycle. Tests cover the happy path, API delegation, and error handling for both handlers. Implementation is minimal and matches what the tests specify. Two minor suggestions around test completeness and type sharing.

suggestions.description: Success-path tests do not assert that isError is absent or falsy
suggestions.rationale: The error-path tests assert isError is true, but the success-path tests never verify that isError is undefined/falsy. A bug that sets isError: true on all responses would pass the success tests.
suggestions.suggestion: Add expect(result.isError).toBeUndefined() or expect(result.isError).toBeFalsy() to the success-path tests for both handlers.

suggestions.description: ToolResult is defined locally but will need to be shared across tool files
suggestions.rationale: create-server.ts already uses an inline return type with the same shape. As more tool handler files are added, this type will be duplicated. Not a problem today with one file, but worth noting for the next tool implementation.
suggestions.suggestion: When adding the next tool handler file, extract ToolResult to a shared types module (e.g., src/mcp/types.ts).
